creator: cs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Is one of the ports in the list related to the Mosquitto project you mention?

http://www.freshports.org/search.php?query=mosquit&search=go&num=10&stype=name&method=match&deleted=excludedeleted&start=1&casesensitivity=caseinsensitive

If yes, to which one should users move?
